header.title: Create New Case
header.subtitle: Submit a blood collection request for your patient.

estimates.title: Your Cost Estimate
estimates.updateNotice: Your estimate will update as you complete each step.
estimates.invoiceNotice: This amount will be added to your monthly invoice.

patientDetails.sectionSubtitle: Enter the patient's personal and contact details.
patientDetails.emailHelpText: Type an email and click away to auto-fill details if this patient already exists.
patientDetails.patientFoundDesc: — details auto-filled. You can edit if needed.
patientDetails.minorWarningDesc: A legal guardian must be present during the blood draw.

testRequirements.sectionSubtitle: Specify the tests and target laboratories.
testRequirements.shippingNotice: Materials supplied via Hematch include a flat shipping fee of €8.50 per case, added to your cost estimate.

urgencySpecial.sectionSubtitle: Set urgency level and flag any special requirements.
urgencySpecial.materialBlockNotice: Urgent and emergency scheduling are not available when materials are supplied via Hematch, as preparation requires 3 business days.
urgencySpecial.timeframeDesc: Based on the active urgency, we recommend this window. Need it sooner? You can manually narrow it here.
urgencySpecial.timeframeBlockNotice: Materials supplied via Hematch require 3 business days for preparation and shipping. The earliest available date has been adjusted accordingly.
urgencySpecial.minorFlagAuto: Auto-selected based on Date of Birth.
urgencySpecial.elderlyFlagManual: Prioritize BCs with elderly care experience.

shipping.sectionSubtitle: Choose who handles the lab return logistics per laboratory.

matching.sectionSubtitle: How should the blood collector be assigned?
matching.patientDecidesDesc: All applicants are shown to the patient directly. They choose their preferred collector.
matching.clinicShortlistDesc: You review applicants and create a shortlist. The patient chooses from your shortlist.
matching.clinicApprovalDesc: You review applicants and assign the collector. The patient does not choose.
matching.inviteDesc: These collectors will receive a priority invitation. All other qualified collectors in the area will also be notified.
matching.searchPlaceholder: Search collectors by name or city...

review.sectionSubtitle: Confirm the medical validity and submit.
review.checkbox: I confirm an active therapeutic relationship
review.checkboxDesc: I confirm this patient is under active care and this draw is medically indicated. I understand Hematch acts solely as a logistics intermediary.
review.errorValidation: Please fill out all required Patient and Test fields.
review.errorConsent: You must confirm the therapeutic relationship to submit a case.
